nodes.name: 鸟纲
nodes.summary: 鸟纲（Aves）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: Boyd's shearwater
nodes.summary: Boyd's shearwater (Puffinus boydi), also known as the Cape Verde little shearwater, is a small shearwater which breeds in the Cape Verde archipelago of the Atlantic Ocean some 570 km off the coast of West Africa. The epithet commemorates British ornithologist Arnold Boyd. Sexual Segregation Females take longer foraging trips and travel further north. This seems to be driven by differing preferences for chlorophyll concentration and sea surface temperature. Overall spacial overlap of sexes is low. However, their diets are the same, consisting of fish, fish larvae, and squid. Both males and females feed chicks, but the males contribute more. This may be because females spend more time incubating eggs and are therefore more deprived of nutrition. Taxonomy Boyd's shearwater is sometimes considered a subspecies of either the little shearwater, Audubon's shearwater or Macaronesian shearwater. It has also been shown to be synonymous with the extinct Puffinus parvus Shufeldt of Bermuda. References "Cape Verde Little Shearwater". Avibase. Retrieved 2012-03-02. Olson, Storrs L. (2010). "Stasis and turnover in small shearwaters on Bermuda over the last 400 000 years (Aves: Procellariidae: Puffinus lherminieri group)". Biological Journal of the Linnean Society. 99 (4): 699–707. doi:10.1111/j.1095-8312.2010.01393.x.

nodes.name: 鹱形目
nodes.summary: 鹱形目（Procellariiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联115种鸟类，如加岛信天翁、短尾信天翁、Northern royal albatross等115种鸟类。

nodes.name: 剪水鹱属
nodes.summary: 剪水鹱属（Puffinus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联19种鸟类，如Christmas shearwater、Galápagos shearwater、Fluttering shearwater等19种鸟类。

nodes.name: 佛得角
nodes.summary: 佛得角是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联8种鸟类，包括弯嘴滨鹬、乳色走鸻、红嘴热带鸟等8种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 大西洋
nodes.summary: 大西洋是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联20种鸟类，包括笛鸻、北极海鹦、South American tern等20种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 脊索动物门
nodes.summary: 脊索动物门（Chordata）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 西非
nodes.summary: 西非是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联30种鸟类，包括白腹珍珠雞、绿冠蕉鹃、Black-throated coucal等30种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 动物界
nodes.summary: 动物界（Animalia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鹱科
nodes.summary: 鹱科（Procellariidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联74种鸟类，如南极鹱、Pintado petrel、Southern giant petrel等74种鸟类。
